goal: Celtic Cross middle still tight: rotated #2 overlapped #5/#6 and the cross cards nearly touched
symptom: Center cross (#5,#1,#6) had only 12px gaps and the 92px rotated #2 overhang into #5/#6 ~4px, reading as one dense block.
root_cause: 5x60px columns + 12px gaps left no room; the rotated challenge (60px card -> ~92px bbox) bridged the cross cards.
fix: styles.css mobile .celtic-cross-layout: cards 60->54px (columns 54 54 54 60 54), gap 12->18px, .celtic-slot + center/challenge img max-width 60->54. Cross gaps now 18px, rotated #2 has ~3px clearance (no overlap); span ~273px fits any phone.
verified: chrome-mine MCP with actual styles.css: gap5->1=18, gap1->6=18, challenge overhang -3, span 273; screenshot shows breathing room
notes: Mobile poster-format only. Supersedes the staff-shift attempt (tightness was cross-internal gap + rotated-card overlap). Cards 10% smaller, still readable.
